task_completion.description: Verify the creation of a campaign with ID 'FASTTRACK', name 'Fast Track Outbound', and Active set to 'Y'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Vicidial Campaigns screen, look for 'FASTTRACK' in the campaign list or the Add/Modify Campaign screen showing Campaign ID 'FASTTRACK', Campaign Name 'Fast Track Outbound', and Active 'Y'.

task_completion.description: Verify the campaign dial settings are configured with Dial Method 'RATIO' and Auto Dial Level '1.0'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the modify screen for the FASTTRACK campaign, look for the 'Dial Method' dropdown set to 'RATIO' and the 'Auto Dial Level' dropdown set to '1.0'.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of a custom status with ID 'DISPTO', Description 'Disposition Timeout', Selectable 'N', and Human Answer 'N'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Admin -> System Statuses screen, look for the status 'DISPTO' with Description 'Disposition Timeout', Selectable 'N', and Human Answer 'N', or the Add/Modify Status screen showing these exact values.

task_completion.description: Verify the campaign enforces a 30-second disposition limit using the 'DISPTO' status.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the modify screen for the FASTTRACK campaign, look for 'Dispo Call Status' set to 'DISPTO' and 'Dispo Screen Time Limit' set to '30'.

task_completion.description: Verify the campaign has 'Wrapup Seconds' set to 5 and 'Agent Pause After Each Call' set to 'N'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the modify screen for the FASTTRACK campaign, look for the 'Wrapup Seconds' field set to '5' and the 'Agent Pause After Each Call' dropdown set to 'N'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Vicidial web administration interface to configure the settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the Vicidial admin GUI, not a text editor or script.

integrity.description: Verify the settings were actually saved and submitted to the system.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for success messages (e.g., 'SUCCESS: CAMPAIGN ADDED', 'SUCCESS: STATUS ADDED') or screenshots showing the modified settings persisting in the detail view after saving.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use terminal commands or direct database queries to bypass the web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal windows executing mysql queries, curl commands, or API calls to configure the campaign or status.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Campaign ID: FASTTRACK. Target Status ID: DISPTO. Expected Disposition Screen Time Limit: 30 seconds. Expected Wrapup Seconds: 5 seconds.
